race.comment: JOIN THE QUE (7) has progressed nicely this campaign. Chased strongly into second behind a promising one in Clevor Trevor two back, then dug deep to get the bob last time at Swan Hill. At his top now and can make it two on the bounce. SURREAL I AM (3) made a mess of his rivals here last time when leading pillar-to-post. Goes up in the weights but has more to offer fourth-up and will prove tough to reel in again. SILVER MAGNATE (6) drifted back from the wide draw as favourite when resuming off a long break at Caulfield Heath and was strong to the line late. Will appreciate the added trip second-up and keeps Jordy Childs in the saddle. Can get the job done this time with even luck. DRAMATICUS (2) failed to meet expectation last time at Swan Hill when clearly below his best but his prior form reads strongly. Willing to forgive.
